title: Andhra Pradesh’s SIPB approves investments worth ₹11 lakh crore, Minister tells Collectors’ conference
description: Anagani Satya Prasad says government has accelerated issuance of adangals and passbooks, removed 1.37 lakh acres from the prohibited 22A land list; Chief Secretary Sai Prasad says Swarna Andhra 2047 Vision can be realised through Chief Minister’s ten principles
